creator: babak@farrokhi.net
text:
Hi Florent,

Including main.inc.php and db.inc.php was my mistake during updating
pkg-plist, so please kindly remove them before commiting.
As for the maintaining this port, since I am a widely using this software on
different servers I would be happy to be the maintainer in ports tree.

Yours,
Babak Farrokhi

-----Original Message-----
From: Florent Thoumie [mailto:flz@xbsd.org] 
Sent: Monday, September 18, 2006 1:58 PM
To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
Cc: Babak Farrokhi
Subject: Re: ports/102890

I haven't build-tested it yet but is there a good reason to include
{db,main}.inc.php in the packing list? I think the now-well-known @{un,}exec
would be better.

Also, you've been sending updates for roundcube on a regular basis, would
you be interested in maintaining the port?

--
Florent Thoumie
flz@FreeBSD.org
FreeBSD Committer
